eas_text: A civil authority has issued A FIRE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Elmore, ID; at 2:13 PM on JUN 18, 2026 Effective until 7:13 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: There is a wild fire that is growing rapidly near canyon creek and immigrant rd and moving south watch for the fire, prepare supplies and evacuate if needed
